subtitle: BAPUJI EDUCATION ASSOCIATION
title: Empowering generations through 50+ institutions in education since 1958
details: With a legacy spanning over six decades, Bapuji Educational Association (BEA) has established itself as one of Karnataka’s most respected educational institutions. Founded in 1958, the association has played a significant role in shaping thousands of professionals across engineering, medical, dental, management, and science disciplines.

Today, BEA manages more than 50 educational institutions across Karnataka, offering world-class education with strong academic values. The association is committed to nurturing students with not only technical excellence but also ethical leadership and societal responsibility.

BEA institutions are known for their strong infrastructure, experienced faculty, and industry-aligned curriculum that prepares students for global opportunities. Through continuous innovation and academic excellence, the association has built a reputation for producing highly skilled graduates.

With a focus on research, entrepreneurship, and community engagement, BEA continues to adapt to the evolving educational landscape. Modern laboratories, collaborative learning spaces, and global partnerships ensure students receive holistic development.

Driven by a vision of transforming education and empowering future generations, BEA continues to expand its academic ecosystem while staying rooted in its founding values of knowledge, integrity, and service.

subAbout.title: Leading with Vision: Insights from the Governing Body of BEA
subAbout.detail: Dr. Prabha Mallikarjun, Member of the Governing Body, shares the association's commitment to building an inclusive and progressive academic environment that empowers students for the future.

subAbout.title: Building Beyond Today: The Educational Blueprint for Tomorrow
subAbout.detail: Sri. SS Mallikarjun, Joint Secretary of BEA, outlines the strategic vision for modernizing education through technology, innovation, and global academic collaborations.

subAbout.title: From Vision to Transformation: Shaping the Future of Higher Education
subAbout.detail: Dr. Shamanur Shivashankarappa, Secretary of BEA, highlights the association's mission to continuously transform higher education through research, infrastructure, and student-centric initiatives.
